# glitchtip_organization (Resource)

Manages a GlitchTip organization. The `slug` is derived from `name` by GlitchTip at creation time and is stable across name changes; it is the identifier used for all other API operations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "glitchtip_organization" "example" {
  name = "Acme Inc"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the organization.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the organization was created.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the organization.
- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug derived from the organization name. Used as the organization identifier in the API.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Organizations are imported by their slug.
terraform import glitchtip_organization.example acme-inc
```
